gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (427/ 9)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (427/ 9)

parts.text: أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَنَّهُ

text: إِنَّ أَحَدَكُمْ لَيَكْثُرُ بِهِ الْخَوْفُ مِنَ السُّلْطَانِ وَ مَا ذَلِكَ إِلَّا بِالذُّنُوبِ فَتَوَقَّوْهَا مَا اسْتَطَعْتُمْ وَ لَا تَمَادَوْا فِيهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin yahya, from Ali Bin Al Hassan Bin Ali, from Muhammad Bin Al Waleed, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘If one of you is frequently afraid from the Sultan (ruling authority), and that is not except due to the sins. Therefore abstain up to what is your capacity, and do not be deliberate in it’.
en.sarwar: 27. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan from Muhammad ibn al-Walid from Yunus ibn Ya’qub from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “You may feel afraid of a king because of your disobeying him. You must avoid it if you can and do not continue in such condition.”
